Title: User adds a vehicle through the distributor list after successful registration
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the distributor list.
2. Search for the vehicle in the dataset.
3. Select and add the vehicle.
4. Confirm the vehicle has been added.
Expected Result: The vehicle is successfully added to the system.

Title: User adds a vehicle manually after successful registration
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the distributor list.
2. Choose to insert the vehicle manually.
3. Enter the vehicle details.
4. Confirm the vehicle has been added.
Expected Result: The vehicle is successfully added to the system.

Title: User fails to find a vehicle in the dataset and adds it manually
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the distributor list.
2. Search for the vehicle in the dataset.
3. Confirm the vehicle is not found.
4. Insert the vehicle manually.
5. Confirm the vehicle has been added.
Expected Result: The vehicle is successfully added to the system.

Title: User fails to find a vehicle in the dataset and cannot add it
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the distributor list.
2. Search for the vehicle in the dataset.
3. Confirm the vehicle is not found.
4. Attempt to add the vehicle manually.
Expected Result: The vehicle is not added to the system due to invalid input.

Title: User registers successfully and accesses the distributor list
Test Steps:
1. Register as a new user.
2. Log in.
3. Access the distributor list.
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered and can access the distributor list.

Title: User attempts to access the distributor list without registering
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to access the distributor list.
Expected Result: The user is prompted to register first.

Title: User modifies and saves configuration settings
Test Data: New configuration settings (e.g., threshold values, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Access the configuration settings page.
2. Modify the settings.
3. Save the changes.
Expected Result: The configuration settings are successfully updated.

Title: User attempts to save invalid configuration settings
Test Data: Invalid configuration settings (e.g., negative values, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Access the configuration settings page.
2. Modify the settings with invalid data.
3. Attempt to save the changes.
Expected Result: The invalid settings are not saved, and an error message is displayed.

Title: User accesses the pending orders list
Test Steps: 1. Access the pending orders list.
Expected Result: The user can view the pending orders list.

Title: User attempts to access the pending orders list without logging in
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to access the pending orders list.
Expected Result: The user is prompted to log in first.

Title: User navigates between different pages
Test Steps:
1. Access the distributor list page.
2. Navigate to the statistics page.
3. Navigate back to the distributor list page.
4. Navigate to the configuration settings page.
5. Navigate back to the distributor list page.
6. Navigate to the pending orders list.
7. Navigate back to the distributor list page.
Expected Result: The user can navigate between all specified pages without issues.

Title: User attempts to navigate to a page without proper access
Preconditions: User is logged in but does not have access to certain pages.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to access a restricted page.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to a page they have access to or an appropriate error message is displayed.
